title: calamintha caroliniana
intro: Calamintha caroliniana, also known as Carolina calamintha or Carolina clinic, is a perennial herb native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and relieve stress and anxiety. The plant's leaves and flowers contain essential oils with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it beneficial for reducing fever and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Calamintha caroliniana can be used in teas, infusions, or as a topical application to take advantage of its health benefits, including its potential to ease menstrual cramps and promote a good night's sleep.
